name: Ayesha Khan
route: Lahore → TU Darmstadt • MSc Data Science
quote: Saad’s video on the blocked account literally saved my application. I was about to send the wrong documents. Got my visa in 34 days after our call.

name: Hamza Malik
quote: I thought Ausbildung was only for Germans. After one call with Danial I had the exact checklist. Started my training in Nuremberg 8 months later.
videoTitle: How We Came To Germany From Pakistan

name: Sara Zafar
route: Islamabad → RWTH Aachen • BSc Mechanical Eng
quote: My parents were terrified of the cost. After watching 40+ of their videos I realized public universities in Germany are basically free. Changed our entire family’s future.
